englishDefinitions: To take attention or praise away from someone else by doing or announcing something before they do.
persianTranslation: جلو زدن و توجه را از کسی دزدیدن
دست‌پیشی گرفتن و اعتبار را از کسی گرفتن
examples: I didn't want to steal my brother's thunder by announcing my news at his party.
The company stole its rival's thunder with an early product launch.
She felt disappointed when her idea was stolen and her thunder was stolen.
